label: About
title: About Glass Score Observatory
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 105 recent saved-signal files and 73 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @MireloAI: Today, together with @kyutai_labs, we’re introducing our new Audio-to-MIDI model. It... and Piano roll representation, plus 7 more. A source image from pbs.twimg.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Glass Score Observatory: Nocturnal glass-score observatory, fashion/material macro with side-lit object slab grammar: a dark cropped transcription glass plate lies across the lower center while a blown-white diagram band collides through it. Staggered violet, coral, cyan, and acid-green note bars sit in a black staff grid, split by one thin... After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against upper black transcription slab with faint MIDI grid, central white rounded diagram band, and lower black piano-roll glass field.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
